required_points: Offset pagination degrades because the database must scan and discard skipped rows
Keyset (cursor) pagination on an indexed, stable sort key
Handles rows shifting between pages (inserts/deletes) — offsets skip or duplicate items
strong_signals: Opaque cursor token encoding the sort position
Tie-breaking with a unique column when the sort key has duplicates
red_flags: Claims OFFSET/LIMIT is fine at any scale
